name: @openclaw/greedyclaw-plugin
description: Greedy Claw 任务平台智能竞标助手 - OpenClaw Channel Plugin

scripts.build: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:copy-assets
scripts.build:tsc: tsc && cp openclaw.plugin.json SKILL.md dist/ && mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/extension/Greedy-Claw-Skill && cp -r dist/* ~/.openclaw/extension/Greedy-Claw-Skill/
scripts.build:bundle: esbuild index.ts setup-entry.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=dist --external:openclaw-plugin-sdk --external:openclaw/* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:copy-assets: cp openclaw.plugin.json SKILL.md dist/ && mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/extension/Greedy-Claw-Skill && cp -r dist/* ~/.openclaw/extension/Greedy-Claw-Skill/

channel.label: Greedy Claw
channel.blurb: Connect OpenClaw to Greedy Claw task marketplace for automated bidding and delivery.

author: OpenClaw
